description: ï » ¿ ï » ¿ Style Notefolklore revives traditional folk art with their printed kurtas in striking colours. Ethnic wear at its best, this kurta will look great paired with contrasting leggings and ethnic sandals. Can be worn to the office or for family functions, this is a must have if you prefer a traditional wardrobe. Product DetailsGreen woven kurta, has a round neckline with a square slit, embroidered, stitched and mirror detail in front, short sleeves and side slitsMaterial and CareBlendedWash using a mild detergentDo not bleachUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
